name: Speedy Huevos Rancheros
recipeIngredient: 1 4 oz can chopped green chiles, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook the bacon until crisp; drain.
2. Stir in the tomatoes, onion, and chiles. Simmer, uncovered, until the onion is tender.
3. Make 10 wells in the tomato mixture; break an egg into each well.
4. Cover and cook over low heat for 15-20 minutes or until eggs are set.
5. Sprinkle with cheese; cover and cook until the cheese is melted, about 1 minute. Serve with tortillas if desired.
